name: HR jury duty policy example
answer:
Employees receive up to 5 days of paid jury-duty leave.
Employees receive up to 10 days of paid jury-duty leave.
Employees receive a daily meal stipend while serving.

sources.title: HR Jury Duty Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive up to 5 days of paid jury-duty leave.
Employees should notify their manager and People Operations as soon as they receive a summons.
Additional leave may be approved unpaid.
